scope.summary: Make cloud-only desktop realtime resilient to backend restarts/SSE drops with visible offline status and retrying conversation/message hydration.
goals: Emit explicit cloud realtime connected/disconnected events from the Tauri SSE bridge
Auto-reconnect realtime with bounded backoff after backend restart, stream end, or connect error
Show offline/reconnecting status in the chat shell instead of only a boolean live badge
Retry cloud conversation/message fetches before surfacing failure
Refresh hosted conversations/messages after reconnect succeeds
nonGoals: Removing Rust core local dev/test commands

acceptance.description: If the backend or SSE stream drops, the UI enters reconnecting/offline status, retries the realtime stream with backoff, and rehydrates conversations/messages after reconnect.

verification.manual: Attach frontend/server check output and a runtime smoke that kills/restarts backend or the SSE stream and proves reconnect + fetch retry.
